package rulecoverage

func PositiveUpstreamJsonDecodeSameResponseMultipleTimes() string {
    ruleID := "upstream_json_decode_same_response_multiple_times"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "One upstream HTTP response body decoded into multiple targets in the same handler."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
